steps.title: Recognize the same line
steps.content:
Multiplying the first equation by $5$ gives the second equation:
$$
5(4x+9y)=5(11)
$$
$$
20x+45y=55
$$
So a point only needs to lie on $4x+9y=11$.

steps.title: Select the point
steps.content: This point satisfies the line for every real number $r$, so it lies on both equations in the system. The answer is A.
